title: A Psalm for Thanksgiving. Make a joyful noise to the Lord, all the earth.

verses.t: Serve the Lord with gladness; come before his presence with exultation.
Know that the Lord he is God; he made us, and not we ourselves; we are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.
Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, and his courts with hymns; give thanks to him, praise his name.
For the Lord is good, his mercy is for ever; and his truth endures to generation and generation. Public Domain
